creator: stefan.witzel@zvw.uni-goettingen.de
text:
The spamcontrol source code of spamcontrol 2.4.15 used by qmail-spamcontrol-1.03.2415_1 is not available at master sides given in Makefile. (I perform an update of my ports before running make.)

# cd  /usr/ports/mail/qmail-spamcontrol
# make 

=> spamcontrol-2415_tgz.bin doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/qmail.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www.fehcom.de/qmail/spamcontrol/.
fetch: http://www.fehcom.de/qmail/spamcontrol/spamcontrol-2415_tgz.bin: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/qmail/.
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/qmail/spamcontrol-2415_tgz.bin: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/qmail and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/qmail-spamcontrol.

How-To-Repeat: # cd  /usr/ports/mail/qmail-spamcontrol
# make
